other_observers: Brandon Percival, Cici Lee, David Chartier, many others; Brandon Percival a week or more earlier
specific_location: South Shore marina, Pueblo Reservoir State Park
description: Large white-headed gull with faint streaks on head and nape. Bill large, yellow with red gonys spot. In flight very slow wing beats. Mantle blackish, darker than nearby Lesser Black-backed Gulls. White tail seen in flight. White spots on P10 and P9 at least and black on primary tips contrasting slightly with back color.Behaviors: Mostly sitting at edge of water on tires of the South Shore marina at Pueblo Reservoir.Call: heard in flight and noticeably different from other gull calls at Pueblo Res but nothing I can describe.Plumage: adult winter
